name: The Back Nine Golf | Scottsdale, AZ - North
about: The Back Nine Golf is a golf simulator venue located in Scottsdale, AZ. The venue provides a space for golfers to practice and play in a simulated environment. Specific details about technology, pricing, and atmosphere are not available from the website content.
why_golfers_like_it: Access to advanced golf simulator technology for realistic play
Private rooms available for focused practice or group events
Professional coaching available for skill improvement

faq.question: Do I need to bring my own clubs?
faq.answer: It is recommended to bring your own golf clubs for the best experience, though the venue may offer club rentals.

faq.question: Can I bring my own food and drinks?
faq.answer: The policy on outside food and drinks is not specified. It is best to contact the venue directly for clarification.

faq.question: How long does it take to play 18 holes?
faq.answer: The time required to play 18 holes on a simulator varies, but it typically takes between 1.5 to 2 hours, depending on the simulator setup and pace of play.

faq.answer: Information regarding specific amenities or policies for children is not available from the website.
